name: Williams College
meets_full_need_notes: Williams meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic and international undergraduates. Need-blind admission for all domestic applicants.
no_loan_notes: Williams has a comprehensive no-loan policy for all students receiving financial aid. All need-based aid is in the form of grants that never need to be repaid.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Williams meets full need regardless of admission round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid package through the Office of Financial Aid. Appeals require written documentation of special circumstances, changes in family finances, or unusual expenses.
